DISCOVERY 610, MOTION TO RECONSIDER AND CORRECT ORDER REMOVING CASE FROM TRIAL CALENDAR; AND FOR ENTRY OF MONETARY SANCTIONS AND TERMINAL SANCTIONS IN LIEU THEREOF: 1. THE COURT'S ORDER OF OCTOBER 17, 2008 IS VACATED; 2. THE SUBJECT ACTION IS RESTORED TO THE TRIAL CALENDAR, AND REFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 206 FOR ASSIGNMENT OF A TRIAL DATE AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATE; 3. THE COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING ISSUE AND MONETARY SANCTIONS: A. PLAINTIFF CARL HAYS IS PRECLUDED FROM TESTIFYING AS A WITNESS AT TRIAL IN SUPPORT OF HIS COMPLAINT HEREIN; B. PLAINTIFF CARL HAYS IS PRECLUDED FROM OFFERING INTO EVIDENCE AT TRIAL ANY DOCUMENT THAT OTHERWISE WOULD BE IDENTIFIED AND PRODUCED IN RESPONSE TO THE FIVE CATEGORIES OF DOCUMENTS DESCRIBED IN DEFENDANT'S "RE-NOTICE OF DEPOSITION WITH PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS" DATED MARCH 12, 2008; C. MONETARY SANCTIONS SHALL ISSUE IN THE SUM OF $1,290.00. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, NOT REPORTED.

Motion To Reconsider Or Correct Order Removing Case For Trial Calendar, To Be Heard By Commissioner Paul Slavit
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
Court's motion to reconsider and correct order removing case from trial calendar; and for entry of monetary sanctions and terminal sanctions in lieu thereof:
1. The Court's order of October 17, 2008 is vacated;
2. The subject action is restored to the trial calendar, and referred to Department 206 for assignment of a trial date and mandatory settlement conference date;
3. The court orders the following issue and monetary sanctions:
a. Plaintiff Carl Hays is precluded from testifying as a witness at trial in support of his complaint herein;
b. Plaintiff Carl Hays is precluded from offering into evidence at trial any document that otherwise would be identified and produced in response to the five categories of documents described in defendant's "Re-Notice Of Deposition With Production Of Documents" dated March 12, 2008;
c. Monetary sanctions shall issue in the sum of 1,290.00. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Vacated

Re-Notice Of Mtn For Monetary And Terminal Sanctions For Repeated Refusal To Reply With Discovery And Obey Court Orders Or In The Alt To Drop Case From Trial Calendar And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Atkinson-Baker, Inc.'s Motion For Monetary Sanctions And Terminal Sanctions For Repeated Refusal To Reply With Discovery And Obey Court Orders, Or In The Alternative To Drop Case From The Trial Calendar And For Monetary Sanctions, granted as follows:
1. The subject action is ordered off calendar, the current trial date of December 1, 2008 is vacated;
2. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $1,250.00, to run jointly and severally against plaintiff and his counsel of record. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Atkinson-Baker Inc.'s motion to compel the attendance of plaintiff at deposition and to extend the discovery cut-off is granted.
